nrqlQueries.query: FROM Log SELECT uniqueCount(host.name) as 'Devices' WHERE substring(host.name,7,3) IN ('GSC', 'POS', 'CSO') and store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}'

FROM Log SELECT filter(uniqueCount(concat(host.name, Name, Node)), WHERE State = 'Zombie') as 'Unique Plugins/Host/Node' WHERE source = 'newposHeartbeat' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET Name as 'Plugin name' LIMIT MAX

SELECT count(*) FROM InfrastructureEvent WHERE changedPath = 'services/windows_services/NpSharp' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET cases(WHERE summary = 'Service started: NpSharp' as 'Started', WHERE summary = 'Service stopped: NpSharp' as 'Stopped')
SELECT count(*) as 'Application Restarts' FROM appRestart WHERE store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}'

rawConfiguration.title: Percentage of Application Restarts by Reason

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM appRestart WHERE store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET cases(WHERE restartCase = 'rfmPackage' AS 'RFM/Binary update', WHERE restartCase = 'logOnOff' AS 'Windows logoff', WHERE restartCase = 'automatedReboot' AS 'Automated Reboot', WHERE restartCase = 'remoteReboot' as 'Remote restart command', WHERE restartCase = 'unknown' as 'Unknown', WHERE restartCase = 'deviceReboot' as 'Device Reboot') as 'Reason'

rawConfiguration.title: Number of Application Restarts by Reason + Device Type

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) as 'Application Restarts' FROM appRestart where store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET cases(WHERE restartCase = 'rfmPackage' AS 'RFM/Binary update', WHERE restartCase = 'logOnOff' AS 'Windows logoff', WHERE restartCase = 'automatedReboot' AS 'Automated Reboot', WHERE restartCase = 'remoteReboot' as 'Remote restart command', WHERE restartCase = 'unknown' as 'Unknown', WHERE restartCase = 'deviceReboot' as 'Device Reboot'), capture(host.name, r'.{7}(?P<dt>.{3}).*') as 'Device Type' LIMIT MAX

rawConfiguration.title: Top 10 Devices with multiple Application Started

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM InfrastructureEvent WHERE changedPath = 'services/windows_services/NpSharp' AND summary = 'Service started: NpSharp' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET hostname, summary  as 'Status' LIMIT 10

rawConfiguration.title: Top 10 Devices with multiple Application Stopped

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM InfrastructureEvent WHERE changedPath = 'services/windows_services/NpSharp' AND summary = 'Service stopped: NpSharp' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' FACET hostname, summary as 'Status' LIMIT 10

SELECT timestamp, NRConfigRelease, agentVersion, changedPath, summary, country, deltaId, format, hostname, instanceType, newValue, oldValue, store.number FROM InfrastructureEvent WHERE changedPath='services/windows_services/NpSharp' AND store.number = '{{tags.store.number}}' LIMIT MAX
